title: IndustrialTS examples artifact catalog
description: Central catalog for local inputs, benchmark history, full-run results, notebooks, and rendered visual artifacts used by examples.

groups.title: Benchmark analysis publication packs
groups.include_policy: store summaries, plots, tables, and source metadata here; raw benchmark inputs stay external
groups.notes: Leaderboard, rank, delta, diagnostics, M4 forecast comparison, and pipeline population report packs.

groups.title: Forecasting benchmark publication packs
groups.include_policy: store summaries, plots, forecast comparisons, and tables here; raw forecasting data stays external
groups.notes: M4, Monash, Kaggle, and forecasting scenario report packs.

groups.title: Industrial applied-domain publication packs
groups.include_policy: store summaries, plots, tables, and scenario-level forecast comparisons here; local raw data stays external
groups.notes: Applied EEG, economic, energy, equipment, health, environment, crypto forecasting, and regression report packs.

groups.title: Historical benchmark archive inputs
groups.include_policy: describe and upload through DVC or manual cloud folder; do not commit raw archive payloads
groups.notes: Composition history, M3/M4 local data, and historical result directories used by notebook reports.

groups.title: Examples utils local data
groups.include_policy: manifest-only by default; upload large local zips, pickles, mats, and benchmark csv files through cloud/DVC
groups.notes: Task-based fixtures plus local benchmark/raw data organized under examples/utils/data.

groups.title: Current Kernel Learning full-run artifacts
groups.include_policy: upload resumable run artifacts to cloud/DVC; keep checkpoints and raw outputs out of git unless explicitly lightweight
groups.notes: Fresh UCR, TSER, M4, and related Kernel Learning run artifacts used by the benchmark showcase.

benchmark_showcase.title: UCR univariate classification
benchmark_showcase.notes: Full UCR comparison with source-aware best-target delta and model diagnostics.

benchmark_showcase.title: TSER regression
benchmark_showcase.notes: Regression comparison against SoTA tables and current Kernel Learning TSER full-run artifacts.

benchmark_showcase.title: M4 Monthly forecasting
benchmark_showcase.notes: Local M100 Monthly M4 comparison with 100/100 series coverage.

benchmark_showcase.title: PDL and UCR classification
benchmark_showcase.notes: PDL-focused comparison; full PDL source is represented as pending until local run artifacts are available.

benchmark_showcase.title: Evolutionary pipeline population
benchmark_showcase.notes: Composition history dynamics, notable pipelines, and operation frequency from archive data.
